announcement.SChinese: 树懒服务器正在大规模的更新反作弊，因此我们并不再推荐您于官方服务器上游玩TONX！开发者也不会花时间对于官方服务器进行适配。请使用Modded，Niko以及其他允许+25的服务器进行游玩。
announcement.English: Innersloth was currently enhancing the server anti-cheat. As a result, we no longer recommend playing TONX on the vanilla regions! The developers will not be spending time adapting the game for the vanilla regions. Please play on Modded, Niko, and other regions that allow +25 Mode.
